text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the day of the race, Tokyo Racecourse is
buzzing with an incredible level of excitement.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In one corner is the Umamusume who defeated
the Eternal Top Three. In the other, the legendary
Umamusume whose return no one expected.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And now, they're about to go head to head in a
2,400-meter G1 showdown on Tokyo turf—the
same conditions as the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Japan Cup—Sakura Chiyono O and
Maruzensky's personal Derby—is about to begin.
